HomePage.heroDescription: Stop wasting hours on complex MSO portals. Import, track, and submit bulk payments in minutes. Made specifically for cable TV operators in South India.
HomePage.benefitsDescription: Built from the ground up for cable operators who need simplicity and speed
HomePage.workflowDescription: From MSO data to bulk payment submission - simplified
HomePage.ctaTitle: Stop Wasting Time on MSO Portals
HomePage.ctaDescription: Collection Ledger is designed by cable operators, for cable operators. Start your free trial today and see the difference.

import.title: Import
import.description: Upload data from SCV or other MSO providers

export.title: Export
export.description: Download and bulk submit to MSO instantly

saveTime.title: Save Hours Daily
saveTime.description: What takes 30+ minutes on MSO portals now takes 2 minutes. Process hundreds of customers instantly.

bulk.title: Handle Bulk Operations
bulk.description: Import thousands of customer records at once. Track, update, and export in one place without headaches.

realtime.title: Real-time Payment Status
realtime.description: See exactly which customers have paid, are pending, or need follow-up. Clear visibility into your collections.

secure.title: Secure & Reliable
secure.description: Your data is encrypted and backed up. Never lose a payment record or customer information.

download.title: Download from MSO Provider
download.description: Export customer data from SCV or your MSO provider portal

import.title: Import into Collection Ledger
import.description: Upload the CSV file - we parse it instantly and organize by status

track.title: Track Collections in Real-Time
track.description: Update payment status as customers pay. See pending and paid customers at a glance

submit.title: Export & Submit to MSO
submit.description: Download the formatted list and submit bulk payments back to your MSO provider

acceptance.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing and using Collection Ledger, you accept and agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use this service.

license.heading: 2. Use License
license.body: Permission is granted to temporarily use Collection Ledger for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. Under this license, you may not:

list.commercial: Use the materials for commercial purposes or public display
list.reverse: Attempt to decompile or reverse engineer any software on Collection Ledger
list.notices: Remove copyright or other proprietary notices from the materials
list.transfer: Transfer the materials to another person or mirror them on another server

disclaimer.heading: 3. Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: The materials are provided on an 'as is' basis without warranties of any kind, including implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.

limitations.heading: 4. Limitations
limitations.body: Collection Ledger and its suppliers are not liable for damages, including data loss, profit loss, or business interruption, arising from the use or inability to use the service.

accuracy.heading: 5. Accuracy of Materials
accuracy.body: The service may contain technical or typographical errors. We do not warrant that materials are accurate, complete, or current.

links.heading: 6. Links
links.body: Collection Ledger has not reviewed all linked websites and is not responsible for their content. Including a link does not imply endorsement.

modifications.heading: 7. Modifications
modifications.body: Collection Ledger may revise these terms at any time without notice. Continued use of the service means you agree to the latest version.

list.compliance: Complying with all applicable data and collections laws

law.heading: 9. Governing Law
law.body: These terms are governed by the laws of India, and you submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts in India.

contact.heading: 10. Contact Information
contact.body: If you have questions about these terms, contact support@collectionledger.com.

introduction.heading: 1. Introduction
introduction.body: Collection Ledger ("we", "our", or "us") operates the Collection Ledger application. This page explains how we collect, use, and disclose personal data when you use our service.

collection.heading: 2. Information Collection and Use
collection.body: We collect different types of information to provide and improve our service.

list.personal: Personal Data: Email address, name, and other contact information
list.customer: Customer Data: Payment records, collection status, and financial information you upload
list.usage: Usage Data: Information about your use of our service, including IP address, browser type, and visited pages
list.cookies: Cookies: Used to remember your preferences

usage.heading: 3. Use of Data
usage.body: Collection Ledger uses collected data to:

security.heading: 4. Security of Data
security.body: We value your data security, but no internet transmission or electronic storage method is 100% secure. We use commercially acceptable safeguards but cannot guarantee absolute security.

changes.heading: 5. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.body: We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

contact.heading: 6. Contact Us
contact.body: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact support@collectionledger.com.
